title: Planet Field and Atmosphere
description: A terrestrial planet inspection path with undeformed sphere-direction ownership, a deterministic CPU terrain stack evaluated by the same value-noise field in GLSL, tangential planet-space climate warping, coupled ocean/biome/roughness causes, derivative bump and specular anti-aliasing, and one Rayleigh/Mie model shared by atmosphere and surface lighting.
techniques: shared deterministic CPU and GLSL terrain field
coupled climate biome and material masks
derivative procedural bump and roughness filtering
bounded Rayleigh and Mie atmosphere integration
